title: fix(ingestor): NBA and NHL offer ingest zero rows — startsAfter window excludes live games
root_cause: SGO league IDs for NBA/NHL were correct and the default ingestor league list includes both sports. The bug was in fetchAndPairSGOProps: the default startsAfter was set to the current snapshotAt, which excluded playoff games that had already started — even though SGO serves live odds (oddsAvailable=true) for in-progress games. Active playoff games with start times before the snapshot were silently filtered out.

fix.change: Changed default startsAfter from snapshotAt to subtractHoursFromIso(snapshotAt, 12), adding a 12-hour lookback window for live games. Explicit startsAfter overrides are preserved.

runtime_change_note: Single-line change to the SGO event query default window. No DB schema changes. Effect: NBA/NHL playoff games in progress will now appear in provider_offers on the next ingestor run.
